commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=91aa31e63439a2152fca23ac3efe2c2b1d836fa7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes exec command detail middle truncation to call `sliceUtf16Safe` for both sides and adds a regression test for emoji/surrogate boundary truncation.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +22. Total +23 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main raw-slices long exec detail strings at `src/agents/tool-display-exec.ts:445`, and the PR's regression input puts an emoji across that boundary through `resolveExecDetail`.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human handling is needed because the contributor must add real behavior proof and the helper boundary should be made browser-safe before merge.

target.title: fix(agents): truncate exec command detail on code-point boundaries
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Salvages #96424 by @ly-wang19 onto current `main` — clean single-commit rebase, original authorship preserved. The original was auto-closed by `openclaw-barnacle` for the author's >20-active-PR cap, not on merits; the bug is still live on `main`.

The exec command-detail middle-truncation (`src/agents/tool-display-exec.ts`) cuts at a raw UTF-16 code-unit offset, so an exec detail containing emoji/astral characters near either boundary renders a lone surrogate around the `…`.

### Root Cause

**Symptom** — A long exec command detail with emoji near the head or tail truncation boundary shows a broken glyph at the cut.

**Root cause** — Line 445: `return \`${oneLine.slice(0, half)}…${oneLine.slice(-(maxLength - 1 - half))}\`;`. Both slices are code-*unit* cuts; a boundary inside a surrogate pair severs it.

**Fix + why this level** — Back the head/tail offsets off to code-point boundaries before slicing (sibling to the #96420 fix in `tool-display-common.ts`). The truncation site is the only producer of the boundary, so it's the correct layer.

**Scope / risk** — Touches only the exec-detail middle-truncation. BMP-only and below-threshold details are unaffected; the `…` separator is preserved.

## Evidence

- **Regression test (new):** `src/agents/tool-display.test.ts` — asserts no lone surrogate at either boundary of the exec detail; **fails without the fix**.
- **Captured runs on this branch:**

WITH fix:
```
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  42 passed (42)
```

WITHOUT fix (test against current `main` source for `tool-display-exec.ts`):
```
      Tests  1 failed | 41 passed (42)
```

## Changes from original

- Rebased onto current `main` (clean single commit, no conflicts).
- No code changes from @ly-wang19's original.

Credit: **Salvage of #96424 by @ly-wang19** — rebased onto current main. Original closed by the >20-active-PR queue cap, not on merits.
target.author: bartok9
